title: Toni's 3D Leaf Litter Lite
description: 3D Block Textures for Leaf Litter with smaller texture than the original one
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab903640b438d2606ad166b9aa3a075cc0e8b113.png)
## 🍂 Toni's 3D Leaf Litter — Lite version

A lighter and more subtle version of the original 3D Leaf Litter pack.  
This Lite edition keeps the natural 3D effect but uses thinner, less dense leaf layers for a cleaner and more performance‑friendly look.

Perfect for players who want added depth without heavy visual thickness, or for worlds where a softer, more minimal forest floor fits better.

- ✅ Thinner 3D layers
- ✅ Compatible with most texture packs (like [Living Leaf Litter](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/living-leaf-litter))
---
